instruction: Rewrite the CVE description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A stored cross site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Checkmk 1.6.0x prior to 1.6.0p19 allows an authenticated remote attacker to inject arbitrary JavaScript via a javascript: URL in a view title.
output: The Checkmk software version 1.6.0x before 1.6.0p19 is affected by a stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability. This flaw allows an authenticated attacker to inject arbitrary JavaScript code through a 'javascript:' URL within a view title.
